title: [BTB] Back To Basics
description: BTB is a shader that emulates the looks of old retro PS1 3D games.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/TwgjqaARcQ0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## About
BTB simulates the physical restrictions of the PS1 3D games to transform your Minecraft in a nostalgic moment.

It's so good that it optimises your game!

## Features
- Low screen resolution
- Affine texture mapping
- 16bit colors
- Dithering
